templates.name: Simple Kill Quest
templates.description: Completes when the player defeats a specific neutral squad. Rewards gold on completion.

templates.name: Counter-Based Quest
templates.description: A multi-stage quest that tracks progress using a counter. Shows how to sequence subquests.

templates.name: Timed Event
templates.description: Fires a dialog and consequence after a set number of turns. Uses StartTurn condition.

templates.name: Dialog-Driven Quest
templates.description: An NPC interaction quest: the player clicks an object, sees a dialog, and receives a task.
